steps.title: Compare the march roles
steps.content: The notes give two different contributions to the March on Washington. Watkins worked behind the scenes to ensure a woman was included in the speakers' lineup, while Moore was the woman who spoke.

steps.title: Keep both sides of the contrast
steps.content: Choice A omits Watkins's specific role. Choice B gives background but not Moore's contribution to the march. Choice D groups the women together without distinguishing their actions. The choice contrasting Watkins's organizing with Moore's speech directly compares their contributions. The answer is C.
